title: GSK Acquires Nuvalent for $10.6B
headline: GSK agrees to acquire oncology biotech Nuvalent for $10.6 billion ($124/share in cash), marking its largest-ever acquisition and bolstering its lung cancer pipeline.
key_facts: $10.6 billion deal value ($9.4 billion net), $124/share, 40% premium to last closing price, 26% premium to 30-calendar-day VWAP, Nuvalent stock surged ~39%, third GSK acquisition since January 2026, second-largest biotech deal of 2026, two lung cancer drugs under FDA review

title: Lilly Licenses AlzeCure's Alzheimer Drug
headline: Eli Lilly licenses AlzeCure Pharma's gamma-secretase modulator Alzstatin ACD680 with global rights in a deal worth up to $1 billion in milestone payments.
key_facts: Up to $1 billion deal value, gamma-secretase modulator, global rights, small-molecule approach

title: WuXi AppTec Added to Pentagon Blacklist
headline: WuXi AppTec is added to Pentagon's 1260H list, automatically triggering designation as a biotechnology company of concern under the Biosecure Act.
key_facts: Pentagon 1260H list, Biosecure Act, June 9 2026, supply chain disruption risk

title: ADA 2026: Lilly Dominates GLP-1 Race
headline: At ADA 2026, Eli Lilly's Foundayo strengthens its case against Novo's semaglutide, with RBC analysts naming Lilly the clear winner as oral GLP-1 competition intensifies.
key_facts: Oral Wegovy crossed 3 million prescriptions, Novo targeting 2030 triple-G obesity shot, AstraZeneca oral GLP-1 achieved Phase 2 wins, Lilly named clear ADA winner

title: Gilead's Trodelvy Misses in First-Line NSCLC
headline: Gilead's Trodelvy (sacituzumab govitecan) fails to meet its primary endpoint in first-line non-small cell lung cancer, though Merck-Gilead HIV combination pill succeeds in two trials.
key_facts: Trodelvy missed first-line NSCLC endpoint, Merck-Gilead HIV combo scored positive results in 2 trials, first-of-its-kind combination pill

title: Tango's Pancreatic Cancer Data Boost
headline: Tango Therapeutics' combination therapy demonstrates response rates exceeding historical benchmarks in a small pancreatic cancer clinical trial.
key_facts: Small clinical trial, boosted response rates beyond historical benchmarks, pancreatic cancer indication

title: Incyte Acquires Vega Therapeutics
headline: Incyte acquires Vega Therapeutics (Star Therapeutics offshoot) for $1.25 billion upfront with potential $2 billion total value to advance late-stage bleeding disorder drug.
key_facts: $1.25 billion upfront, potentially $2 billion total deal value, late-stage bleeding disorder drug, Star Therapeutics offshoot

title: J&J Acquires Firefly Bio for $1B
headline: Johnson & Johnson acquires Firefly Bio for $1 billion, gaining access to degrader antibody technology merging protein degraders with ADC platforms for KRAS-focused oncology programs.
key_facts: $1 billion acquisition, degrader antibody technology, protein degraders + ADC, KRAS focus, founded by Nobel laureate Carolyn Bertozzi

title: Roche Stakes $700M on Nurix BTK Drug
headline: Roche invests $700 million upfront in Nurix Pharmaceuticals' protein-degrading BTK inhibitor in a deal potentially valued up to $2.3 billion.
key_facts: $700 million upfront, up to $2.3 billion total deal value, BTK protein degradation, targeted protein degradation thesis

title: FDA June 2026 Decisions Due
headline: FDA decisions expected in June 2026 on Spero Therapeutics' antibiotic for cUTI, Kiniksa's Arcalyst manufacturing transfer, and Merck's WELIREG-KEYTRUDA combination.
key_facts: Spero antibiotic for complicated urinary tract infections, Kiniksa Arcalyst manufacturing technology transfer, Merck WELIREG + KEYTRUDA first approval, Pfizer pediatric hemophilia treatment approved
